errors.name: UnauthorizedClient
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only the client can perform this action

errors.name: UnauthorizedContractor
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only the contractor can perform this action

errors.name: InvalidContractStatus
errors.msg: Invalid contract status for this action

errors.name: InvalidCheckpointStatus
errors.msg: Invalid checkpoint status for this action

errors.name: InvalidCheckpointIndex
errors.msg: Checkpoint index is out of range

errors.name: PaymentAmountMismatch
errors.msg: Sum of checkpoint payment amounts must equal total_amount

errors.name: EmptyHash
errors.msg: Hash string cannot be empty

errors.name: EmptyDescriptionHash
errors.msg: Description hash cannot be empty

errors.name: InvalidCheckpointCount
errors.msg: Checkpoint count must be between 1 and 10

errors.name: MaxRevisionsExceeded
errors.msg: Maximum revision count exceeded for this checkpoint

errors.name: InvalidDeadline
errors.msg: New deadline must be after the current deadline

errors.name: DeadlineNotExpired
errors.msg: Checkpoint deadline has not expired yet

errors.name: DisputeWindowNotExpired
errors.msg: Dispute window has not expired yet — client still has time to review

errors.name: CheckpointAlreadySubmitted
errors.msg: Checkpoint has already been submitted, cannot expire

errors.name: InsufficientEscrowFunds
errors.msg: Insufficient funds in escrow token account

errors.name: CannotCancelWithSubmittedCheckpoints
errors.msg: Cannot cancel: there are checkpoints in Submitted status

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow during penalty calculation

errors.name: InvalidPenaltyConfig
errors.msg: Penalty BPS exceeds 10,000 (100%) — invalid configuration

errors.name: InvalidContractParties
errors.msg: Client and contractor cannot be the same account

errors.name: UnauthorizedResolver
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only the AI agent or admin can resolve disputes

errors.name: CheckpointNotDisputed
errors.msg: Checkpoint is not in Disputed status

errors.name: ConfigAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Program config is already initialized

errors.name: MintCooldownNotExpired
errors.msg: Mint cooldown not expired — you can only mint once per day

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Invalid token account — mint or owner mismatch

errors.name: MintNotInitialized
errors.msg: Mock USDC mint has not been created yet

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only the admin can perform this action

errors.name: CannotCancelWithDisputedCheckpoints
errors.msg: Cannot cancel: there are checkpoints in Disputed status

errors.name: MaxRevisionsTooHigh
errors.msg: max_revisions_per_checkpoint cannot exceed 10

errors.name: SupplyCapReached
errors.msg: Mock USDC supply cap reached — no more tokens can be minted

errors.name: InactivityPeriodNotReached
errors.msg: Contract has not been inactive long enough for admin cancellation

errors.name: CannotCancelWithAwaitingAiReview
errors.msg: Cannot cancel: there are checkpoints awaiting AI review

errors.name: InvalidCreatedAt
errors.msg: created_at must be within 5 minutes in the past or 1 hour in the future
